name: New
description: Initial state when a sales order is first created or imported into the system.
content: Entry conditions: order successfully created via API import, manual import, or re-import after cancel. Executable actions: validate order data, apply hold rules, trigger auto-dispatch. Allowed next states: Pending, OnHold, Exception.
aliases: 新建,待处理,新订单,待派单

name: Pending
description: Order is validated and awaiting dispatch to a warehouse.
content: Entry conditions: order passes initial validation and no hold rules triggered. Executable actions: auto-dispatch, manual dispatch, cancel. Allowed next states: Allocated, OnHold, Cancelled, Exception.

name: OnHold
description: Order is temporarily held due to a triggered hold rule or manual intervention.
content: Entry conditions: hold rule matched or operator manually holds. Executable actions: review hold reason, release hold, cancel. Allowed next states: Pending, Allocated, Cancelled.
aliases: 拦截,暂停,被hold,挂起,冻结

name: Allocated
description: Order has been dispatched and assigned to a specific warehouse for fulfillment.
content: Entry conditions: dispatch process successfully assigns a warehouse. Executable actions: deallocate, push to WMS, cancel. Allowed next states: Processing, Deallocated, Cancelled.
aliases: 已分仓,已分配仓库,仓库已接单

name: Processing
description: Order is being picked, packed, or prepared in the warehouse.
content: Entry conditions: WMS accepts the shipping request. Executable actions: update shipment info, report exceptions. Allowed next states: Shipped, ShortShipped, Exception, Cancelled.
aliases: 处理中,备货中,仓库处理中

name: Shipped
description: All items in the order have been shipped from the warehouse.
content: Entry conditions: WMS confirms full shipment with tracking number. Executable actions: track delivery, handle returns. Allowed next states: Closed.
aliases: 已发货,已出库,shipped

name: Cancelled
description: Order has been cancelled and will not be fulfilled.
content: Entry conditions: customer cancellation, operator manual cancel, or timeout cancel. Executable actions: none (terminal state). Allowed next states: none.
aliases: 已取消,已撤销,cancelled

name: Exception
description: Order encountered an error during processing that requires manual intervention.
content: Entry conditions: dispatch failure, WMS rejection, inventory shortage, address validation failure, or system error. Executable actions: retry dispatch, manual fix, cancel. Allowed next states: Pending, Allocated, Cancelled.
aliases: 异常,卡单,处理异常,exception

name: PO Created
description: Initial state when a purchase order is first created in the system.
content: Entry conditions: PO successfully created from PR, DI, POS, WMS, or HTML source. Executable actions: push to warehouse, cancel. Allowed next states: Push To Warehouse, PO Cancelled.
aliases: PO已创建,采购单已创建

name: Push To Warehouse
description: Purchase order has been sent to the designated warehouse for inbound processing.
content: Entry conditions: PO successfully pushed to WMS. Executable actions: await WMS status callback, cancel. Allowed next states: PO Processing, Push To Warehouse Fail, PO Cancelled.

name: Push To Warehouse Fail
description: Purchase order failed to be accepted by the warehouse system.
content: Entry conditions: WMS rejects or fails to process the PO push. Executable actions: retry push, cancel. Allowed next states: Push To Warehouse, PO Cancelled.
aliases: 推仓失败,WMS拒单,推单失败

name: PO Processing
description: Purchase order is being received and processed at the warehouse.
content: Entry conditions: WMS confirms PO is in progress. Executable actions: receive goods, report exceptions. Allowed next states: PO Closed, PO Exception, PO Canceling.
aliases: PO处理中,采购单处理中

name: PO Closed
description: Purchase order has been fully received and closed.
content: Entry conditions: all expected goods received or force-closed. Executable actions: none (terminal state). Allowed next states: none.
aliases: PO已关闭,采购单完成

name: PO Cancelled
description: Purchase order has been cancelled before completion.
content: Entry conditions: operator cancels or system timeout. Executable actions: none (terminal state). Allowed next states: none.
aliases: PO已取消,采购单已取消

name: PO Canceling
description: Purchase order cancellation is in progress, awaiting warehouse confirmation.
content: Entry conditions: cancel request sent to WMS for a PO in processing state. Executable actions: await WMS cancel confirmation. Allowed next states: PO Cancelled, PO Exception.
aliases: PO取消中

name: PO Exception
description: Purchase order encountered an error requiring manual intervention.
content: Entry conditions: WMS reports exception, receipt mismatch, or system error. Executable actions: manual fix, retry, cancel. Allowed next states: PO Processing, PO Cancelled.
aliases: PO异常,采购单异常

name: DO New
description: Initial state when a delivery order is first created.
content: Entry conditions: DO created from fulfilled shipping request or manual creation. Executable actions: dispatch pickup, cancel. Allowed next states: DO PickupDispatched, DO Cancelled.

name: DO PickupDispatched
description: Pickup has been dispatched for the delivery order.
content: Entry conditions: carrier pickup scheduled. Executable actions: track pickup status. Allowed next states: DO OutForPickup, DO Cancelled.

name: DO LineHaul
description: Goods are in transit on the linehaul leg between origin and destination hub.
content: Entry conditions: pickup completed and goods handed to linehaul carrier. Executable actions: track transit. Allowed next states: DO PendingDelivery, DO Cancelled.

name: DO PendingDelivery
description: Goods have arrived at destination hub and are awaiting last-mile delivery.
content: Entry conditions: linehaul completed. Executable actions: schedule delivery. Allowed next states: DO OutForDelivery, DO Cancelled.
aliases: 待发货,待配送,准备发货

name: DO Delivered
description: Goods have been successfully delivered to the consignee.
content: Entry conditions: carrier confirms delivery with POD. Executable actions: none (terminal state). Allowed next states: none.
aliases: 已送达,已妥投,妥投成功

name: DO DeliveryFailed
description: Delivery attempt failed due to consignee refusal, address issue, or carrier problem.
content: Entry conditions: carrier reports delivery failure. Executable actions: reschedule, return to shipper. Allowed next states: DO PendingDelivery, DO ReturnToShipper.
aliases: 妥投失败,派送失败,拒收,配送失败

name: DO Cancelled
description: Delivery order has been cancelled.
content: Entry conditions: operator cancels or upstream order cancelled. Executable actions: none (terminal state). Allowed next states: none.
aliases: DO已取消,发货单取消

name: WO Created
description: Initial state when a work order is first created.
content: Entry conditions: WO created via API callback or manual import. Executable actions: dispatch to warehouse. Allowed next states: WO Dispatched, WO Cancelled.

name: WO Dispatched
description: Work order has been dispatched to a warehouse for execution.
content: Entry conditions: dispatch process assigns warehouse. Executable actions: await WMS processing. Allowed next states: WO Processing, WO Cancelled.

name: WO Processing
description: Work order is being executed at the warehouse.
content: Entry conditions: WMS accepts and begins processing. Executable actions: update status, report exceptions. Allowed next states: WO Closed, WO Exception, WO Cancelled.

name: WO Closed
description: Work order has been completed and closed.
content: Entry conditions: all tasks completed or force-closed on expiration. Executable actions: none (terminal state). Allowed next states: none.

name: WO Cancelled
description: Work order has been cancelled.
content: Entry conditions: operator cancels or upstream trigger cancelled. Executable actions: none (terminal state). Allowed next states: none.
aliases: 工单已取消

name: WO Exception
description: Work order encountered an error requiring manual intervention.
content: Entry conditions: WMS reports exception or processing failure. Executable actions: manual fix, retry, cancel. Allowed next states: WO Processing, WO Cancelled.
aliases: 工单异常

name: Quote New
description: Initial state when a sales quote order is created.
content: Entry conditions: quote created by operator or channel. Executable actions: edit quote, convert to sales order, cancel. Allowed next states: Quote Converted, Quote Canceled.

name: Quote Converted
description: Sales quote has been converted into a confirmed sales order.
content: Entry conditions: operator or system converts quote to SO. Executable actions: none (terminal state). Allowed next states: none.

name: Quote Canceled
description: Sales quote has been canceled without conversion.
content: Entry conditions: operator cancels or quote expires. Executable actions: none (terminal state). Allowed next states: none.
aliases: 报价单取消

name: Shipment New
description: Initial state when an outbound shipment record is created.
content: Entry conditions: shipment created from dispatch result. Executable actions: process shipment, void. Allowed next states: Shipment Processing, Shipment Void.
aliases: 运单新建

name: Shipment Processing
description: Shipment is being processed at the warehouse for label generation and packing.
content: Entry conditions: WMS begins processing. Executable actions: generate label, pack, ship. Allowed next states: Shipment Closed, Shipment Exception.
aliases: 运单处理中

name: Shipment Closed
description: Shipment has been completed and shipped.
content: Entry conditions: carrier pickup confirmed. Executable actions: none (terminal). Allowed next states: none.
aliases: 运单已关闭,运单完成

name: Shipment Void
description: Shipment has been voided before processing.
content: Entry conditions: operator voids or upstream cancellation. Executable actions: none (terminal). Allowed next states: none.
aliases: 运单作废

name: Shipment Exception
description: Shipment encountered an error during processing.
content: Entry conditions: label generation failure, packing error, carrier rejection. Executable actions: retry, void, force close. Allowed next states: Shipment Processing, Shipment Void, Shipment Force Close.
aliases: 运单异常

name: Reopen
description: Order is transitioning from Exception or OnHold back to an active fulfillment state. System is re-evaluating dispatch eligibility.
content: Intermediate state between Exception and Dispatched. Corresponds to OrderStatusEnum.REOPEN (code 11). During this state the system re-runs dispatch rule evaluation.
aliases: 重开中,重新处理,恢复中

name: Inventory Available
description: Available stock that has not yet been reserved for any order. Can be allocated to new incoming orders.
content: Represents open_quantity or available_qty in WMS. Transitions to Inventory Reserved when allocation runs. Transitions to Inventory Committed when shipment is confirmed.
aliases: 可用库存,可分配库存,空闲库存

name: Inventory Reserved
description: Stock that has been allocated to a specific order and cannot be assigned to other orders.
content: Corresponds to locked_qty or reserved_qty in the OMS/WMS inventory model. Transitions from Available after Allocate Inventory process runs. Transitions to Deducted after shipment deduction (Deduct Inventory On Shipment).
aliases: 已锁库存,预占库存,冻结库存,reserved

name: Inventory Deducted
description: Stock quantity reduced from system record after goods are confirmed as shipped by WMS.
content: Final state in the inventory lifecycle for a fulfilled order. Triggered by Deduct Inventory On Shipment process when shipment event arrives from WMS. Deduction is recorded as an Inventory Adjustment entry.
aliases: 已扣减库存,出库库存,扣减完成

name: Warehouse Received
description: WMS has accepted the Shipping Request and acknowledged the order; warehouse operations have begun.
content: Entry conditions: WMS sends acceptance callback after receiving Shipping Request. Next states: Committed, Exception. Source enum: OrderStatusEnum.WAREHOUSE_RECEIVED. Precedes the detailed WMS sub-states (Committed, Picked, Packed, Loaded) that mirror WMS workflow milestones.
aliases: 仓库已接收,WMS已受理,入仓确认

name: Committed
description: WMS has internally committed resources and started the pick task for this order.
content: Entry conditions: WMS dispatches the pick task internally. Next states: Picked, Exception. Source enum: OrderStatusEnum.COMMITTED. Emitted via DISPATCH_COMMITED event from WMS callback.
aliases: 已提交,仓库提交,WMS提交

name: Picked
description: Warehouse workers have completed picking all items for the order from shelf locations.
content: Entry conditions: all SKUs in the order have been picked and verified. Next states: Packed, Exception. Source enum: OrderStatusEnum.PICKED. Emitted via DISPATCH_PICKED event.
aliases: 已拣货,拣货完成,picking完成

name: Packed
description: All items have been packed into shipping packages and labeled.
content: Entry conditions: items sealed in boxes, carrier label printed and affixed. Next states: Loaded, Exception. Source enum: OrderStatusEnum.PACKED. Emitted via DISPATCH_PACKED event.
aliases: 已打包,打包完成,装箱完成

name: Loaded
description: Packages have been loaded onto a carrier vehicle and are ready for departure.
content: Entry conditions: packages staged at outbound dock and loaded onto carrier truck. Next states: Shipped (on WMS ship confirmation), Short Shipped (if fewer items loaded than ordered). Source enum: OrderStatusEnum.LOADED. Emitted via DISPATCH_LOADED event.
aliases: 已装车,装载完成,待出发

name: Short Shipped
description: The order was shipped but with fewer items than originally ordered; quantity discrepancy noted at dispatch.
content: Entry conditions: WMS confirms shipment with quantity less than total order quantity. Next states: Shipped (supplementary completes). Source enum: OrderStatusEnum.SHORT_SHIPPED. Distinct from Partially Shipped (multi-line partial fulfillment across separate dispatches). Cancel is blocked once in this state.
aliases: 少发,短发,少件发货,short ship

name: SO Canceling
description: A cancellation request has been sent to WMS and is pending WMS confirmation; the order cannot be modified during this period.
content: Entry conditions: operator triggers cancel on an order in Allocated or Warehouse Processing state; OMS sends cancel request to WMS. Next states: Cancelled (on WMS confirm), Allocated or Warehouse Processing (on WMS rejection). Source enum: OrderStatusEnum.CANCELING. Three-step cancel flow: Apply Cancel -> Initiate Cancel -> Confirm/Reject Cancel via OrderCancelOperationTypeEnum.
aliases: 取消中,撤单中,取消确认中,canceling

name: SO Deallocated
description: The warehouse assignment for this order has been removed and allocated inventory has been released back to the open pool.
content: Entry conditions: operator manually deallocates or WMS rejects the Shipping Request. Next states: Pending (re-dispatch queued). Source enum: OrderStatusEnum.DEALLOCATE. Triggers re-evaluation of dispatch routing rules. Distinct from Cancelled - the order remains active and will be re-dispatched.
aliases: 已解除分仓,取消分配,撤销分仓,deallocated

name: DO OutForPickup
description: The carrier vehicle is en route to the warehouse to collect the package.
content: Entry conditions: carrier dispatched and confirmed en route. Next states: DO PickupCompleted, DO Cancelled. Source enum: DeliveryOrderStatusEnum.OutForPickup (20).
aliases: 取件途中,待取件,承运商揽收中

name: DO PickupCompleted
description: The carrier has physically collected the package from the warehouse and completed the first scan.
content: Entry conditions: carrier scans package at pickup, offloads from warehouse dock. Next states: DO Pending Linehaul (standard), DO Directly Pickup Offload (short-haul). Source enum: DeliveryOrderStatusEnum.PickupCompleted (22). This is the trigger for the first carrier tracking event visible to the end customer.
aliases: 取件完成,揽收完成,首次扫描完成

name: DO OutForDelivery
description: The last-mile delivery driver has departed with the package and is en route to the recipient address.
content: Entry conditions: delivery driver scans package at local hub and departs for delivery. Next states: DO Delivered, DO DeliveryFailed, DO Consignee Refusal, DO Delivered With Exception, DO Partial Delivered. Source enum: DeliveryOrderStatusEnum.OutForDelivery (42).
aliases: 派送中,配送途中,出发派件

name: DO ReturnToShipper
description: The package is being returned to the origin warehouse after exhausted delivery attempts or consignee refusal.
content: Entry conditions: multiple delivery failures exceed retry limit (governed by Delivery Failure Retry Rule) or consignee refused delivery. Next states: terminal in DO lifecycle; triggers Update Sales Order on Return To Shipper process. Source enum: DeliveryOrderStatusEnum.ReturnToShipper (55). Inventory updated on physical receipt at warehouse.
aliases: 退回发件方,RTS,退仓,退货回仓

name: DO Pending Linehaul
description: Package has been offloaded from the pickup vehicle and is awaiting the linehaul truck departure.
content: Entry conditions: package offloaded at hub after pickup; not yet loaded onto linehaul truck. Next states: DO LineHaul. Source enum: DeliveryOrderStatusEnum.PendingLinehaul (26).
aliases: 等待干线,待干线发车,干线集货中

name: DO Directly Pickup Offload
description: Package was offloaded directly at the pickup facility without entering the standard linehaul queue.
content: Entry conditions: delivery destination is within local hub coverage; no linehaul required. Next states: DO PendingDelivery or DO OutForDelivery. Source enum: DeliveryOrderStatusEnum.DirectlyPickupOffload (23).
aliases: 直接卸货,就地转运,短途直发

name: DO Partial Delivered
description: Some items within a multi-item delivery order have been successfully delivered while others remain undelivered.
content: Entry conditions: multi-item DO with split delivery; carrier confirms delivery of subset. Next states: DO Delivered (completion), DO DeliveryFailed (remaining items fail). Source enum: DeliveryOrderStatusEnum.PartialDelivered (44).
aliases: 部分交付,部分签收,分批交付

name: DO Delivered With Exception
description: Delivery was completed but the carrier or recipient reported an exception such as visible damage or incorrect items.
content: Entry conditions: carrier delivers but notes an exception on the delivery record (package damaged, open, or incorrect). Next states: terminal for DO; triggers Return Order or Exchange Order creation. Source enum: DeliveryOrderStatusEnum.DeliveredWithException (50).
aliases: 异常签收,带异常交付,签收有异常

name: DO Consignee Refusal
description: The recipient explicitly refused to accept the delivery at the door.
content: Entry conditions: carrier arrives at delivery address; consignee declines to accept package. Next states: DO ReturnToShipper (standard), DO PendingDelivery (if rescheduled). Source enum: DeliveryOrderStatusEnum.ConsigneeRefusal (52).
aliases: 拒签,拒收,收件人拒绝

name: DO Incomplete
description: Delivery attempt resulted in an unresolved or indeterminate status with no clear confirmation of success or failure.
content: Entry conditions: carrier reports delivery as incomplete without specific resolution (left at door without signature, access denied, or carrier unable to confirm outcome). Next states: DO Parcel Lost (on SLA breach + manual declaration), DO PendingDelivery (on reschedule). Source enum: DeliveryOrderStatusEnum.Incomplete (54).
aliases: 不完整交付,未确认交付,配送结果未知

name: DO Parcel Lost
description: The package has been declared lost; no dedicated system enum - this status is determined by operators when DO remains in Incomplete beyond carrier SLA thresholds.
content: Entry conditions: DO stays in Incomplete state beyond the carrier SLA investigation window without resolution; operator manually declares parcel lost per Lost Parcel Declaration Rule. Next states: terminal. Note: OMS has no LOST enum value; this state is a semantic overlay on Incomplete enforced by operational procedure. Carrier claim and resolution happen outside OMS.
aliases: 丢件,包裹丢失,包裹遗失,lost parcel
